description: Use this API to define or modify the Scenario comments. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariosetcomments(ncommentblocks, comments, append)

parameters.name: ncommentblocks
parameters.description: Number of 72 character strings that make up the comment. in python, this number can be set to 1 and the full comment string given as the first comment block. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: An array of NCOMMENTBLOCKS elements specifying comment string to be defined for or added to the comments for the Scenario. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: append
parameters.description: Flag for appending comments. if true, comments is appended to the current scenario comments. if false, the current scenario comments are overwritten by comments. (input; FALSE by default).
